rows.label: tev009001_MSG0001
rows.name: This place seem quite nice![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev009001_MSG0002
rows.name:
Think it okay to poke around?
Tatsu want to explore a bit,
make self feel at home![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev009001_MSG0003
rows.name:
Goetia act all high and mighty,
but Nopon were on Mira first.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev009001_MSG0004
rows.name:
Friends show Goetia what happen to
those who mock Nopon! By which
Tatsu mean beating of some sort.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev009001_MSG0005
rows.name:
Lin-san and friends are robots?
Tatsu not see that one coming![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev009001_MSG0006
rows.name:
After all, friends have warm bodies, and
like to eat meals and take baths...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev009001_MSG0007
rows.name:
Honestly, Tatsu would never have guessed!
Technology of friends is amazing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev009001_MSG0008
rows.name:
Friends can go complete
mission or whatever.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev009001_MSG0009
rows.name:
Tatsu stay here and practice cooking
technique that Lin-san teach him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev009001_MSG0010
rows.name:
Big thing friends saw in Nightglow
Forest probably got frightened
of Tatsu and ran far away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev009001_MSG0011
rows.name:
And yet, Tatsu not hear any words of
thankitude for saving lives of friends.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev009001_MSG0012
rows.name:
Moist apple pie! Fluffness cake!
Crunchtastic cookies! Lin-san
make best desserts on Mira![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev009001_MSG0013
rows.name:
Tatsu get serious about BLADE work now.
That way Tatsu earn more reward treats![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev009001_MSG0014
rows.name:
In order to drive enemies away,
Tatsu run round and round and
deliver many supplies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev009001_MSG0015
rows.name:
Now you reward Tatsu with nice
meal. Wait, no! Dinner party![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev009001_MSG0016
rows.name:
Kitty people are pretty cool.
Not Tatsu cool—but cool.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev009001_MSG0017
rows.name:
Tatsu gives friends permission to
invite kitty people to NLA anytime.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev009001_MSG0018
rows.name:
When Tatsu faces super-giant foe, Tatsu
is inspired to fight with full strength![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev009001_MSG0019
rows.name:
But fighting giants is exhausting, so
now Tatsu stay here and do guard duty.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev009001_MSG0020
rows.name:
Sounds like friends are finally
going to find important thingy
they seek for so long.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev009001_MSG0021
rows.name:
Hard to imagine that friends would achieve
this without tireless help of Tatsu.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev009001_MSG0022
rows.name:
But no no! Tatsu not need gratitude!
...Still, if friends WANT to buy Tatsu
thanky dessert, he would not refuse to eat it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev009001_MSG0023
rows.name:
Friends go out and enjoy nice
leisurely mission! Tatsu will
stay and guard house for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev009001_MSG0024
rows.name:
And while you gone, Tatsu not have to
share Lin-san meals with anyone! Yay![ST:wait ]
